arts.ttl: How to watch Wolves vs Nottm Forest
arts.sum: Wolves vs Forest kicks off at 8pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 7.30pm. Live text coverage of Wolves vs Forest is also being provided on Monday evening as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: Wild claim club want to sign Nottingham Forest star – Want to hold transfer talks
arts.sum: There are wild claims in the Turkish media that Besiktas want to sign Nottingham Forest forward Chris Wood in this transfer window. It’s been well documented the Black Eagles want to sign a centre forward this month and are reportedly now looking to target Forest’s top scorer. The former Chelsea player has been linked with a return to the Premier League in recent days, with Wolverhampton Wanderers the latest club said to be showing interest.
